summary: Fresh local database for fixed iCloud sync — re-add accounts and notes after updating.

changed: First launch on v0.4.0 wipes the local SwiftData database and OAuth keychain tokens to clear incompatible CloudKit sync metadata from earlier releases
Settings → iCloud runs a CloudKit write probe and clearer export-failure diagnostics
fixed: iCloud note export can recover after the one-time local database reset on upgrade
breaking: Updating to v0.4.0 removes local notes, clipboard history, cached mail, and Google sign-in state on this Mac — re-add accounts and recreate or restore notes after updating
